message:
test(wave-52): pure data-type coverage for security, observability, distributed/recovery

Add 9 tests exercising Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Hash/Default derives:
- security/error: AuthErrorKind (Hash), AuthError (Clone, Eq)
- observability/level: LogLevel (Hash, Default, Clone/Copy)
- security/authenticated: AuthenticatedSymbol (Debug, Clone, Eq)
- distributed/recovery: CollectionConsistency, RecoveryPhase,
  RecoveryTrigger, RecoveryConfig, RecoveryProgress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
